name: Fresh Tomato and Cucumber Salad
instructions: Dice the tomatoes and cucumbers. Toss them in a bowl with olive oil, salt, and finely chopped parsley.

name: Cabbage and Egg Stir-fry
instructions: Shred cabbage. Scramble eggs and set aside. Stir-fry garlic and cabbage, add soy sauce, then mix in eggs.

name: Creamy Orange Smoothie
instructions: Blend peeled oranges, milk, honey, and ice until smooth.

name: Classic Herb Omelette
instructions: Whisk eggs with milk. Melt butter in a pan, pour in eggs, and cook until set. Garnish with herbs.

name: Citrus Cabbage Slaw
instructions: Mix shredded cabbage, grated carrots, and orange segments. Dress with lemon juice and parsley.

name: Shakshuka
instructions: Simmer onions, garlic, and peppers in tomatoes. Crack eggs on top and cook until set.

name: Cucumber Cream Cheese Sandwiches
instructions: Spread cream cheese on bread, add sliced cucumbers and parsley.

name: Tomato Cream Soup
instructions: Sauté onions in butter. Add tomatoes and simmer. Blend, then stir in milk for creaminess.

name: Lemon Garlic Grilled Chicken
instructions: Marinate chicken in lemon juice, oil, garlic, and rosemary. Grill until cooked through.

name: Beef and Carrot Stew
instructions: Brown beef and onions. Add carrots, potatoes, and broth. Simmer for 2 hours until tender.

name: Spaghetti Bolognese
instructions: Cook beef with onions and garlic. Add tomatoes to make sauce. Serve over boiled spaghetti.

name: Baked Salmon with Herbs
instructions: Place salmon on foil. Top with butter, garlic, lemon slices, and parsley. Bake at 200C for 15 mins.

name: Chocolate Brownies
instructions: Melt chocolate and butter. Whisk in sugar and eggs, then fold in flour. Bake at 180C for 25 mins.

name: Apple Cinnamon Oatmeal
instructions: Cook oats in milk. Top with diced apples, a sprinkle of cinnamon, and a drizzle of honey.

name: Garlic Roast Pork
instructions: Rub pork with minced garlic, rosemary, and oil. Roast at 190C until internal temp reaches 63C.

name: Berry Yogurt Parfait
instructions: Layer yogurt, berries, and granola in a glass. Drizzle with honey between layers.

name: Hearty Lentil Soup
instructions: Sauté veggies. Add lentils and broth. Simmer until lentils are soft (about 30 mins).

name: Fluffy Pancakes
instructions: Mix dry and wet ingredients separately, then combine. Fry small amounts of batter in a buttered pan.

name: Quick Shrimp Scampi
instructions: Sauté shrimp and garlic in butter. Add lemon juice and parsley. Toss with cooked pasta.

name: Potato and Onion Frittata
instructions: Fry sliced potatoes and onions in oil until soft. Pour beaten eggs over them and cook until firm.
